commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Telegram `send.ts` fallback that retries legacy HTML send/edit when rich Telegram send/edit throws an error classified as unsupported.

PR surface: Source +46. Total +46 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main uses raw rich Telegram methods when `richMessages` is true, and the PR classifier catches generic rich-method 400 errors. I did not run a live Telegram or version-pinned Bot API reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR needs contributor real-behavior proof and maintainer review of the fallback contract before any repair or merge path should proceed.

target.title: feat(telegram): add sendRichMessage fallback to legacy sendMessage
target.author: ajwan8998
